item.description:
-–

title: “Accomplishments”

date: 2026-05-30

-–

## Certifications (Planned/In Progress)

- GitHub Foundations

- Hugo Static Site Development

## Achievements

- Successfully deployed personal website on GitHub Pages

- Learning bilingual site development (English/Russian)

-–

title: “Experience”

date: 2026-05-30

-–

## Academic Projects

**Student Developer** | 2024 - Present

- Building personal website using Hugo and GitHub Pages

- Learning version control with Git

## Coursework

- Web Development

- Programming Fundamentals

- Data Structuressd

-–

title: “Building a Bilingual Website with Hugo”

date: 2026-05-31

-–

## Why a Bilingual Website?

Having a website in multiple languages makes your research accessible to more people. My site now supports:

- **English** - For international audiences

- **Russian** - For local readers

## How Hugo Handles Multilingual Content

Hugo makes bilingual sites easy:

1. Create content/en/ for English pages

2. Create content/ru/ for Russian pages

3. Configure languages in hugo.toml

-–

title: “Week 1 Recap: Getting Started with GitHub Pages”

date: 2026-05-30

-–

This week I:

- Set up a GitHub repository: BereketDA.github.io

- Installed Hugo static site generator

- Configured a working theme (Ananke)

- Created my first homepage

Next week: Adding bilingual support and more posts!

-–

title: “Week 3 Recap: Academic Profiles and Bilingual Setup”

date: 2026-05-31

-–

This week I completed:

- Registered on **ORCID** and **ResearchGate**

- Created a **Google Scholar** profile

- Added academic links to my website

- Learned about Markdown vs LaTeX for documentation

Next week: Adding Russian translations and making the site fully bilingual!

-–

title: “Personal Academic Website”

date: 2026-05-31

summary: “Building a bilingual academic website using Hugo and GitHub Pages”

-–

## Project Overview

This website is my personal academic portfolio, built as part of my studies.

## Technologies Used

- **Hugo** - Static site generator

- **GitHub Pages** - Free hosting

- **Markdown** - Content creation

- **Git** - Version control

## Features

- Bilingual support (English/Russian)

- Blog posts about technical topics

-–

title: “Skills”

date: 2026-05-30

-–

## Technical Skills

- **Programming Languages:** Python, JavaScript, HTML/CSS

- **Version Control:** Git, GitHub

- **Tools:** Hugo, VS Code, Command Line

- **Web Technologies:** Static sites, Markdown

## Soft Skills

- Problem solving

- Quick learner

- Team collaboration

- Time management

## Currently Learning

- Data Science fundamentals

- LaTeX for document preparation

- CI/CD pipelines
